Class PointOfInterest

java.lang.Object
org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util.PointOfInterest
public class PointOfInterest extends Object
An object used by Odometry to create virtual points on the play field that can be used to get important relative information from
Author:
YesItIsEvan
